'''''Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi'' 2''' is the second volume in the Return of the Jedi manga series. It was illustrated by [[Shin-Ichi Hiromoto]] and was based upon the original story by George Lucas. It was adapted from the screenplay by [[George Lucas]] and [[Lawrence Kasdan]]. The cover art is by [[Adam Warren]].

[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] attempts to throw [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] into the [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|Great Pit of Carkoon]]. But as Luke and the gang escape Jabba's henchmen, Jabba is choked to death by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. After escaping the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], Luke goes to [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], who passes away before him.

==Continuity==
*Jabba's death scene is more graphic in the manga than in the movie.
*A scene was added in the manga where a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean guard]] attacks Luke. The two fight until the guard is killed by Leia.
*Leia is picked up by Luke instead of running to him.
